baselineExplanation: The canonical baseline remains partial because the provider-driven live spot check is intentionally optional and currently skipped in the default deterministic path.
whyPartialIsTruthful: Repo-mode and installed-mode coding-loop proof remains covered, all required secondary surfaces pass (web-mode, mcp, workflow-bmad, worktree-session-recovery, rebrand-drift), and only the non-blocking live/provider lane stays outside the deterministic must-pass set.
